summary: A website for a car toys business. The site will showcase and potentially sell car toy products.

existing_features.title: Create a homepage with a hero section featuring a compelling headline, tagline, and call-to-action button (e.g., 'Shop Now') for the car toys business.
Create a product showcase section displaying car toy items in a responsive grid. Each product card must show a product image placeholder, product name, short description, and price.
Add a navigation bar with the business logo/name, links to Home, Products, About, and Contact sections, and a shopping cart icon placeholder.
Add an About section describing the car toys business and a Contact section with a simple contact form (name, email, message fields).

Apply a bold, energetic visual theme inspired by motorsport and die-cast toy aesthetics — using a dark charcoal background with vivid red and metallic silver accents, strong typography, and card-based layouts. Enforce this theme consistently across all sections.
Generate and display custom images as static assets: a hero banner background with a dramatic race track and colorful toy cars scene, and a logo icon featuring a stylized toy car.

Update the website/business name displayed across all sections of the site — including the Navbar logo/name, Hero section headline and tagline, About section brand copy, Footer brand info, page title in index.html, and any other place the current business name appears — to a new name chosen for the car toys brand.

Revert the website/business name back to the original first name that was auto-generated before any renaming occurred. Update all occurrences across the site: Navbar logo/name, Hero section headline and tagline, About section brand copy, Footer brand info, and the page title in index.html.

new_feature_requests.summary: Car toys business website with product showcase
Store and retrieve sample car toy product data (name, description, price, category) in the backend so the frontend can query and display them.
Revert the website/business name back to the original first name that was generated.
